allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Recurse app/api -Filter route.ts | Where-Object { Select-String -Path $_.FullName -Pattern '\\''supabase/server'\\'' -Quiet } | ForEach-Object { \(Get-Content $_.FullName\) -replace "import \\{ createClient \\} from '\\''@/lib/supabase/server'\\'';", "import { createRouteClient as createClient } from '\\''@/lib/supabase/route-client'\\'';" | Set-Content $_.FullName; Write-Host $_.FullName }')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('error',{}\).get\('message'\) or f\\"{len\(d.get\('items',[]\)\)} results\\"\)")
